description_long: This handbag features a broad, slightly trapezoidal body with a textured brown leather exterior that gives it a rugged, natural appearance. The front and back surfaces are plain, while the sides display a glossy, embossed leather panel with intricate swirling patterns. The top of the bag is open, with a subtle inward fold suggesting a soft, flexible structure. Two short, flat leather straps are attached to the upper sides, likely for hand carrying. The overall design is understated yet elegant, with the embossed side panels providing a touch of visual interest.
description: A brown leather handbag with a broad, soft body and glossy, embossed side panels featuring swirling patterns. It has two short leather straps and an open top.
description_view_0: The front view shows a plain, textured brown leather surface with a wide, slightly slouched shape and no visible straps or decorations.
description_view_1: The side view reveals a glossy, embossed leather panel with swirling patterns and two short, flat leather straps attached at the top.
description_view_2: The back view mirrors the front, displaying a plain, textured brown leather surface with a soft, natural drape.
description_view_3: The opposite side view again shows the glossy, embossed leather panel with swirling patterns and the two short straps at the top.
attribute_strap_type: Two short, flat leather handles attached at the top sides; not adjustable; designed for hand carrying.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Open top with no visible closure mechanism.
attribute_decorative_elements: Embossed swirling patterns on the glossy side panels.
attribute_pattern: Embossed swirling pattern on side panels; otherwise plain.
